definition:
1. a coming together, meeting, joining , (Xenophon Historicus): the juncture  of two parts, the end , Lat. commissura, (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. in hostile sense, an encounter, engagement, battle , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. = συμβόλαιον II, a contract, covenant , (Aristotle Philosopher); in (Aristophanes Comicus) Ach. there is a play on signfs. II and III, encounter  and accounts, charge  and charges.  
4. in plural, συμβολαί were contributions  for a common meal, πίνειν ἀπὸ συμβολῶν, like de symbolis(Terentius Grammaticus Latinus) entertainment  itself, a picnic , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
